sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17973" key="au)to/trofos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-τροφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αὐτόσιτος</ref></xr>, condemned by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">179</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
